scripts.game:plan: pnpm run tn -- game plan --goal "three lane metro endless runner with coins, trains, jump barriers, duck gates, objectives, and retry" --project . --json
scripts.game:improve: pnpm run tn -- game improve --apply-plan artifacts/game-production/plan.json --project . --json
scripts.game:qa: pnpm run tn -- game qa --project . --run-proof --entity runner --press KeyD --expect-axis x --json
scripts.recipe:controller: pnpm run tn -- game plan --goal "three lane metro runner controller" --project . --json
